TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cihak, title = Cihak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cihak} }

S.FORM: alang Cihak ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syuhong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 995 buwan, 2,905 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 379 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 2,526 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Truku 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihak hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cihak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cihak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihak hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihak hya' ga Adetuman. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cihak ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syuhong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 995 buwan, 2,905 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 379 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 2,526 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Truku 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihak hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cihak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cihak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihak hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihak hya' ga Adetuman. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjuħoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħak ħjaʔ ɣa a*etuman. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
